headlines.headline: Yorven Labs names new head of renewable storage division

sentiment.reasoning: Naming a new head of a division is a leadership change that can signal strategic direction or operational improvements, but its immediate financial impact is often neutral or slightly positive.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
